name: Drive Freedom
author: Poki
description: Drive Freedom is a driving game that lets you unleash your inner daredevil and enjoy the wild freedom of the open road! Speed up, drift, and take on crazy stunts as you tear through the city. Smash into traffic lights, buildings, or even the postman—no rules, just pure driving chaos! The only limits? Your gas tank and your car's condition. Collect coins along the way to upgrade your ride and complete fun missions to earn XP. Are you ready to hit the road with no boundaries? How to play Drive Freedom? Drive: WASD or the arrow keys Handbrake: the space bar Activate: E View Missions: 1 Vehicle Shop: 2 Respawn: R Who created Drive Freedom? Drive Freedom is created by David Evans. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Drive Freedom for free? You can play Drive Freedom for free on Poki. Can I play Drive Freedom on mobile devices and desktop? Drive Freedom can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
